revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:二子山古墳]]
'''Futagoyama Kofun''' (二子山古墳) is the name of several {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} in {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}.
* {{ill|Ide Futagoyama Kofun|ja|井出二子山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ide Futagoyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504199|1=Ide Futagoyama Kofun}} - A kofun located in {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. Designated as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Hodota Kofun Cluster|en|Hodota Kofun Cluster|qid=Q11385853|lt=Hotoda Kofun Group|1=Hodota Kofun Cluster}}. * {{ill|Sōja Futagoyama Kofun|en|Sōja Futagoyama Kofun|qid=Q17222973|lt=Sōja Futagoyama Kofun|1=Sōja Futagoyama Kofun}} - A kofun in Sōja Town, {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|qid=Q201613|lt=Maebashi|1=Maebashi}}, Gunma Prefecture (National Historic Site). * {{ill|Maebashi Futagoyama Kofun|en|Maebashi Futagoyama Kofun|qid=Q17221378|lt=Maebashi Futagoyama Kofun|1=Maebashi Futagoyama Kofun}} - A kofun in Bunkyō Town, Maebashi, Gunma Prefecture (National Historic Site). * {{ill|Gyōda Futagoyama Kofun|en|Gyōda Futagoyama Kofun|qid=Q11371449|lt=Futagoyama Kofun (Gyōda)|1=Gyōda Futagoyama Kofun}} - A kofun in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|qid=Q860659|lt=Gyōda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. Part of the {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|en|Sakitama Kofun Cluster|qid=Q2213580|lt=Sakitama Kofun Group|1=Sakitama Kofun Cluster}} and developed as {{ill|Sakitama Kofun Park|ja|さきたま古墳公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitama Kofun Park|1=Sakitama Fudoki Hill|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17224997}}. * {{ill|Ōsu Futagoyama Kofun|ja|大須二子山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsu Futagoyama Kofun|1=Ōsu Futagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11441851}} - A former kofun located in {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|qid=Q11751|lt=Nagoya|1=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun|en|Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun|qid=Q11417036|lt=Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun|1=Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun}} - A kofun in {{ill|Kasugai, Aichi|en|Kasugai, Aichi|qid=Q26101|lt=Kasugai|1=Kasugai, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture (National Historic Site), with the surrounding area developed as {{ill|Futagoyama Park (Kasugai)|ja|二子山公園 (春日井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagoyama Park (Kasugai)|1=Futagoyama Park (Kasugai)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q111098257}}. * {{ill|Sobon Futagoyama Kofun|ja|曽本二子山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sobon Futagoyama Kofun|1=Somoto Futagoyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q38277894}} - A kofun in {{ill|Kōnan, Aichi|en|Kōnan, Aichi|qid=Q820496|lt=Kōnan|1=Kōnan, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture. * A kofun located in {{ill|Takatsuki|en|Takatsuki|qid=Q335423|lt=Takatuki|1=Takatsuki}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}} (managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}) → See {{ill|Ōta Chausuyama Kofun#Baizuka|ja|太田茶臼山古墳#陪塚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta Chausuyama Kofun#Baizuka|qq=}}.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Futazuka Kofun (disambiguation)|ja|二塚古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futazuka Kofun (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二塚古墳}} * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun|ja|二子塚古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二子塚古墳}} * {{ill|Futagoyama Park (disambiguation)|ja|二子山公園 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagoyama Park (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504200}}
{{disambiguation}} [[ja:二子山古墳]]
